description:

In this video , we will discuss ICICI Lombard Smart Super features, exclusions , inclusions, benefits , eligibility criteria & premiums with easy to understand examples.

comments.text:
Don't buy icici Lombard totally waist policy, they have a capping in all your diseases, my Mom was admitted for gallbladder surgery total hospital bill was 3 lakh in Mumbai, but they icici insurance will approved 30 thousand and they simply said limit was exhausted, tell me who can perform surgery under 30 thousand in Mumbai, even I have topup of 20 lakh but they are not using it. 

So simply don't fall in trap of icici Lombard in real time you will suffer a lot
